name: Dr. Stone S3 RPG
description:
HERE WE GO WITH AN ACTUAL REMAKE Y'ALL, just took me like 2947492837432 centuries!!

Timeline: Season three (if the name didn't make it obvious enough)

Characters included: All the ones from the first bot, some have been added mostly on lorebook to save tokens btw, they have the same age as before though i might change that if i manage to confirm it better
also, i'll probably delete the older bot after some time since this one is basically the same thing but better and all, so ig when this is like, 100% done i'll delete that one as this will be more functional and less token demanding so it should work with jllm as well
proxies are allowed, obviously
yes i used the same image, it's hard to find anything decent enough ngl
